title: chrysanthemum boreale
intro: Chrysanthemum boreale, also known as the Korean chrysanthemum or boreal chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum boreale include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Chrysanthemum boreale can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
